svg.text: Browser-only · PKCE · Read-only Microsoft Graph · Built by Aboutcloud (aboutcloud.io)
BROWSER APPLICATION (all tenant data stays here — nothing sent to any EntraPass server)
Overview — score ring + stat tiles + infra chips
Filter pills · Search · CSV export (13 cols)
No disk persistence · No server copy
MSAL token cache also stored here
Capable — MFA + modern device, can self-register
Needs Prep — one gap to fix
Blocked — CA policy or multiple gaps
Exempt — break-glass / guest / personal MSA (excluded from passkey targets)
Modern device: Win 10+ · iOS 16+ · Android 14+ · macOS 13+
Users · Devices · CA Policies · Apps · Auth Methods
Sign-in Logs · Org Info · Service Principals
Calls run in browser — no data touches EntraPass servers
App Registration lives in user's own tenant
Tokens expire ~60 min · silent refresh via MSAL
EntraPass · github.com/arusso-aboutcloud/EntraPass · Built by Aboutcloud (aboutcloud.io) · MIT License
All tenant data stays in the user's browser. The only external calls are to Microsoft Graph API (read-only, delegated).
